MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER LAWRENCE SISKIND Second Amended Notice Of Hearing on First Amended Petition to Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award. Seth Appel, Esq. of Harvey Siskind LLP (415) 354-0100, appearing for Petitioner and moving party. Tentative ruling vacated. (Matter restored to calendar, that the Court took off in error.) Hearing held. Ruling: Motion is Granted, no opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
